Reference

MetaParams

Code of Conduct

sarpyx project spaces are for focused, respectful technical collaboration.

  • Keep discussions professional and relevant to the project.
  • Report bugs with enough context to reproduce or investigate them.
  • Give review feedback that is specific, actionable, and tied to code or docs.
  • Do not share private credentials, proprietary data, or sensitive mission artifacts in public issues or discussions.

Maintainers may moderate issues, pull requests, discussions, or comments that make collaboration unsafe or unproductive.

sarpyx Documentation  ·  built with build_site.py
